description: Analyze hotel bookings and cancellations in WPS Spreadsheet using /home/ga/Documents/resort_hotel_bookings.xlsx. In the 'Bookings' sheet, calculate 'Total_Nights' as the sum of weekend and week nights, 'Potential_Revenue' as Total_Nights multiplied by adr, and 'Lead_Time_Bracket' by categorizing lead_time (<=30 as '0-30', <=90 as '31-90', <=180 as '91-180', and >180 as '180+'). Create a new sheet named 'Segment_Analysis' containing a summary table for the segments 'Online TA', 'Offline TA/TO', 'Direct', 'Corporate', and 'Groups'. The table must include the following columns: Market_Segment, Total_Bookings, Cancellations (where is_canceled = 1), Cancellation_Rate (formatted as percentage), and Lost_Revenue (sum of Potential_Revenue for canceled bookings, formatted as currency). Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/resort_hotel_bookings.xlsx.
